CONSTANTES ESPECTROSCOPICAS
----------------------------------------------
 WE(cm-1)   = 210.3117412699652
 WEXE(cm-1) = 0.6528287920880
 WEYE(cm-1) = -6.0928983613690e-04
 ALFAE(cm-1)= 7.1776410312962e-04   (com WE/WEXE/WEYE do J=0)
 GAMAE(cm-1)= -4.5964008864800e-06   (com WE/WEXE/WEYE do J=0)

CONSTANTES ROTACIONAIS (de Bv = (E_v(J=1)-E_v(J=0))/2)
----------------------------------------------
 B0(cm-1) = 2.2301837584992e-01
 B1(cm-1) = 2.2229141894490e-01
 B2(cm-1) = 2.2155526923806e-01
 BE(cm-1)    = 2.2337840700174e-01
 ALFAE(cm-1) = 7.1776410318986e-04
 GAMAE(cm-1) = -4.5964009131455e-06
